verses.text: Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah a ci na-in si dektak hi. Amoz' tapa, kamsang Isaiah ama kiangah hong pai-in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na innsung thu ding vaihawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na damkikzo kei ding a, na si ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah kawm lam nga-in Topa' tungah thu ngen a
“ Topa aw, ka lungsim khempeuh leh thuman tak tawh nangma mai-ah gamta-in, nangma muhna-ah a hoih nate ka sepna thu, tu-in nong phawkna dingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Hezekiah nakpi takin a kap hi
Tua ciangin Isaiah tungah Topa' thu hong tung a

“Pai in la Hezekiah kiangah gen in. Topa, na pa David’ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na thungetna ka za khin a, na khitui ka mu khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nuntakna kum sawm leh kum nga kong piak beh ding hi
Assiria kumpipa' khutsung panin nang leh khuapi kong honkhia ding a, hih khuapi ka hu ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi
Isaiah in, “Amah in hong ciamsa thu Topa in hong bawlna dingin, hih pen Topa’ tung panin nangma-a' dingin lim ahi hi
En in, Ahaz kumpipa' ni-nai tungah nitum kuana liim pen kal sawm ka nungkiksak ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tum khinsa ni pen ni-nai tungah kal sawm a nungkik hi
Judah kumpipa Hezekiah a ci na-in, a natna panin a damkik khit ciangin la phuakin a gelh lai in
Ka hat saan laitakin a si ding ka hita a, ka hun omlai khempeuh Leinuai-ah a om dingin hong kiseh hita hi, ka ci hi
A hingte' gamsungah Topa ka mu nawn kei ding a, leitunga a teng mite' lakah mihing ka en nawn kei ding hi, ka ci hi

Tuucingpa' puanbuk bangin ka omna inn kibotkhia-in kei kiang panin kilakhia hi. Siamgante in a hial bangin ka nuntakna kihial khin a, amah in siambu panin kei hong atkhia hi. Sun leh zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak a
zingsang dong huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Humpinelkai bangin amah in ka guh khempeuh hong kuaihtansak a, sun leh zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak hi
Phialphiah ahi a, gun vapi bangin ahi zongin ka hamham a, vakhu bangin ka tautau hi. Vantung lam kong etetna-in ka mitte a gim hi. Topa aw, kei hong kinengniam hi; keima lungmuan'na hong hi ta in
Ahih hangin keimah in bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei tungah hong gen khin a, amahmah in hih thu hong bawl hi. Ka lung gim lua a, ka ihmu thei kei hi
Topa aw, nang-a' dingin kong nungta ding a, nang-a' ding bekbekin kong nungta ding hi. Ka ci hong damsakkik in la, hong nungtasak in
Gimna lianpi ka thuakna pen keima lungnopna hong suak ding hi. Lauhuaina khempeuh panin kei nong honkhia a, ka mawhna khempeuh na hong maisak hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Leinuai-ah a om mite in nangma tungah lungdamna hong ko theilo a, a sisa mite in nang hong phat theilo uh hi. Gum sunga a paisukte in nangma thumanna hong muang theilo uh hi
Tuni-in keima hong gamtat bangin a hing mite bek in nang tungah lungdamna hong ko thei hi. Pate in tate tungah nangma thumanna gensawn uh hi
Topa in kei hong hon ding a, Topa' inn sungah i nuntak sung tawntung khausai lasakna i tum ding hi.
Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Theigah la sak in la, na damkikna dingin na meimate nuhsak in,” a ci hi
Hezekiah in, “ Topa’ inn-ah ka paitoh zawhna ding a kitheihna dingin bang lim om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
